overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut exploring a rocky alien coastline at dusk. The character walks from a desert-like terrain into shallow ocean water, with dramatic atmospheric lighting and distant mountains silhouetted against a darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky alien desert plain approaching coastline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the rocky terrain toward the distant ocean visible on the horizon

entered.detail: massive dark boulder formation looming on the left side of the frame
scattered rocks and reddish-brown sandy ground covering the landscape
silhouetted mountain range visible on the horizon against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide alien desert landscape at dusk. The character walks away from a large rock formation toward a distant coastline, with scattered boulders dotting the reddish terrain and mountains silhouetted against the dimming sky.

events.description: character steps from rocky beach into the shallow ocean water, creating small splashes

agents.ego_description: wading into the shallow surf and walking along the water's edge

entered.detail: calm turquoise alien ocean with gentle waves lapping at the shore
rocky beach and coastline forming the boundary between land and water

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from dry land into the shallow coastal waters. The large rock formation recedes behind as the ocean fills the foreground, with gentle waves surrounding the character's legs and the rocky shoreline curving along the right side.

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through shallow water alongside prominent rocky cliffs

entered.detail: tall dark rock formations and cliffs rising from the coastline on the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the shallow ocean water as the coastline becomes more rugged. Prominent rocky cliffs rise on the right side while open water stretches to the left, with distant rock formations visible on the horizon ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a reddish alien desert that gradually transitions into a rugged coastal seascape at dusk. It begins with the character walking away from a large rock formation across a boulder-strewn landscape toward a distant, silhouetted mountain range. As the character advances, the dry terrain gives way to shallow coastal waters, with the initial rock formation receding as gentle waves begin to surround the character's legs. The scene then shifts as the character continues deeper into the ocean, where the shoreline on the right transforms into prominent rocky cliffs. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a vast expanse of water to the left and distant rock formations emerging on the horizon.
